_documentation.purpose: Example-only pending patch manifest for the v3.9-alpha2 manifest-validation-only runner. Copy to PATCH_MANIFEST.json only after replacing all placeholder values and setting example_only to false.

guardrails: Example manifest only; do not rename this file to PATCH_MANIFEST.json without replacing placeholders.
Patch runner must validate the manifest before any future patch application stage.
Patch runner must log to handoffs/current/patch-runner.
